# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type RequestBody = {
  content?: unknown;
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  chunks?: unknown[];
  delayMs?: number;
};

const encoder = new TextEncoder();

function normalizeHeaders(input?: Record<string, string>): Headers {
  const headers = new Headers();

  if (input && typeof input === 'object') {
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(input)) {
      if (typeof key === 'string' && typeof value === 'string') {
        headers.set(key, value);
      }
    }
  }

  if (!headers.has('content-type')) {
    headers.set('content-type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8');
  }

  if (!headers.has('cache-control')) {
    headers.set('cache-control', 'no-cache, no-transform');
  }

  return headers;
}

function toChunkString(value: unknown): string {
  if (typeof value === 'string') return value;
  try {
    return JSON.stringify(value) ?? '';
  } catch {
    return String(value);
  }
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response('Method Not Allowed', {
      status: 405,
      headers: { allow: 'POST' },
    });
  }

  let body: RequestBody;

  try {
    body = (await req.json()) as RequestBody;
  } catch {
    return new Response('Invalid JSON body', { status: 400 });
  }

  const headers = normalizeHeaders(body.headers);
  const delayMs =
    typeof body.delayMs === 'number' && Number.isFinite(body.delayMs) && body.delayMs > 0
      ? body.delayMs
      : 0;

  const sourceChunks =
    Array.isArray(body.chunks) && body.chunks.length > 0
      ? body.chunks.map(toChunkString)
      : [toChunkString(body.content ?? '')];

  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        for (const chunk of sourceChunks) {
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk));
          if (delayMs > 0) {
            await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, delayMs));
          }
        }
        controller.close();
      } catch (error) {
        controller.error(error);
      }
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    status: 200,
    headers,
  });
}
